prose: Fukui reactivity indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor for aniline computed using DFT with B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry from the provided aniline.xyz file (14 atoms). The calculation uses the finite-difference method: neutral parent state (singlet), N−1 cation state (doublet, charge +1), and N+1 anion state (doublet, charge −1). Mulliken partial charges. Most electrophilic site: atom 3 (C, ortho to NH₂) with f⁺ = 2.298. Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (N) with f⁻ = 0.205. Fukui charge conservation checks passed. SCF converged for all three electronic states. Integrity trustworthy. No warnings.
